author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings 

State of the Economy - Q2 2024

Town Hall day is kicking off with the new Q2 Star Atlas economics report!

Our GDP grew by 6.24% this quarter, bringing the new annual GDP projection to $34,121,660. That's almost as big as a small island nation! 

Read the entire report and learn more about the Star Atlas census, GDP, price indices, which DACs have the most output per user and more!

 | https://staratlas.com/newsroom/economic-reports
